doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The California State Bar does not have a "Legal Services Trust Fund Commission" issuing practice protocols, and paralegals cannot provide legal services under such a waiver system in California.
